description: A foreman arrives on site in the morning and discovers a pallet of copper wire has been stolen overnight.

nodes.task_description: Log the theft in the daily site log, including the type and estimated quantity of stolen material.

expected_outcome.value: The theft is documented in the daily log.

nodes.task_description: File a police report with the local police department regarding the theft.

expected_outcome.value: A police report is filed and a report number is obtained.

nodes.task_description: Notify the project manager and the insurance company of the theft.

expected_outcome.value: All relevant internal and external stakeholders are notified.
